2604.06691.title: KD-MARL: Resource-Aware Knowledge Distillation in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
2604.06691.paper_summary: Real world deployment of multi agent reinforcement learning MARL systems is fundamentally constrained by limited compute memory and inference time. While expert policies achieve high performance they rely on costly decision cycles and large scale models that are impractical for edge devices or embedded platforms. Knowledge distillation KD offers a promising path toward resource aware execution but existing KD methods in MARL focus narrowly on action imitation often neglecting coordination structure and assuming uniform agent capabilities. We propose resource aware Knowledge Distillation for Multi Agent Reinforcement Learning KD MARL a two stage framework that transfers coordinated behavior from a centralized expert to lightweight decentralized student agents. The student policies are trained without a critic relying instead on distilled advantage signals and structured policy supervision to preserve coordination under heterogeneous and limited observations. Our approach transfers both action level behavior and structural coordination patterns from expert policies while supporting heterogeneous student architectures allowing each agent model capacity to match its observation complexity which is crucial for efficient execution under partial or limited observability and limited onboard resources. Extensive experiments on SMAC and MPE benchmarks demonstrate that KD MARL achieves high performance retention while substantially reducing computational cost. Across standard multi agent benchmarks KD MARL retains over 90 percent of expert performance while reducing computational cost by up to 28.6 times FLOPs. The proposed approach achieves expert level coordination and preserves it through structured distillation enabling practical MARL deployment across resource constrained onboard platforms.
2604.06691.paper_summary_zh: 現實世界中多智能體強化學習（MARL）系統的部署根本上受到有限計算記憶體和推理時間的限制。雖然專家策略能夠實現高性能，但它們依賴於昂貴的決策周期和大規模模型，這對於邊緣設備或嵌入式平台來說是不切實際的。知識蒸餾（KD）提供了一條有前景的資源感知執行路徑，但現有的MARL中的KD方法過於狹隘地專注於行為模仿，往往忽略了協調結構，並假設代理的能力是均勻的。我們提出了一種資源感知的多智能體強化學習知識蒸餾（KD MARL）兩階段框架，將協調行為從集中式專家轉移到輕量化的去中心化學生代理。學生策略是在沒有評論者的情況下進行訓練，而是依賴於蒸餾的優勢信號和結構化的策略監督，以在異質和有限觀測下保持協調。我們的方法同時從專家策略中轉移行為層級的行為和結構協調模式，並支持異質學生架構，使每個代理模型的能力與其觀測複雜性相匹配，這對於在部分或有限可觀察性和有限的板載資源下進行高效執行至關重要。在SMAC和MPE基準上的廣泛實驗表明，KD MARL在大幅降低計算成本的同時實現了高性能保留。在標準的多智能體基準中，KD MARL保留了超過90%的專家性能，同時將計算成本降低了多達28.6倍的FLOPs。所提出的方法實現了專家級的協調，並通過結構化的蒸餾保持了這種協調，使得在資源受限的板載平台上能夠實現實際的MARL部署。
2604.06691.author: Monirul Islam Pavel et.al.
2604.06691.authors: Monirul Islam Pavel, Siyi Hu, Muhammad Anwar Masum, Mahardhika Pratama, Ryszard Kowalczyk, Zehong Jimmy Cao
